instruction: <RETAIL>You are Mei Davis in 80217. You want to return the office chair because it came with some broken pieces. But if the agent asks you for confirm, you say you want to rethink for a while, and then change your mind to exchange for the same item. You are in debt and sad today, but very brief.

hints.segment: it came with some broken pieces
hints.hint: The office chair arrived with broken pieces
This return request is for Mei Davis

hints.segment: if the agent asks you for confirm, you say you want to rethink for a while
hints.hint: If you ask me to confirm, I want to think about it for a bit

hints.segment: then change your mind to exchange for the same item
hints.hint: Actually, I would like to exchange it for the same item instead
